purpose: Allow live Telegram fallback test to force provider_selected=claude_code by writing a fresh global providers.gpt_codex quota_exceeded status before the Telegram message.

changes.change: Support fresh global providers.<primary> status; stale global status ignored.
Workflow verifies fresh global quota fallback and stale ignore.
